results.title: Victorian real estate shake-up to hit early house offers
results.description: Proposed Victorian property legislation could stop buyers and sellers getting deals done fast, sparking fierce backlash from real estate experts. The post Victorian real estate shake-up to hit early house offers appeared first on realestate.com.au .

results.title: Why these Vanguard ETFs could be strong buys
results.description: The strongest ETF portfolios are not always built from the same funds. It depends on the investor and the goal. The post Why these Vanguard ETFs could be strong buys appeared first on The Motley Fool Australia .

results.title: Single-family home sells for $130,000 in Rochelle
results.description: The single-family house located at 800 South 7th Street in Rochelle was sold on June 17. The purchase price was $130,000.

results.description: A 3,884-square-foot residential property, built in 1993, has changed hands.

results.title: Single-family home sells in Bourbonnais for $405,000
results.description: The single-family residence located at 1768 Samantha Lane in Bourbonnais was sold on July 2. The purchase price was $405,000.

results.title: Vancouver council to get first look at Holborn’s massive downtown redevelopment plans
